hero.badge: Amahugurwa y'Ururimi ya AI ku Mwuga w'Isi
hero.subtitle: Kwiga Icyongereza bifashijwe na AI kugira ngo umwuga wawe ukure. Iminota 30 gusa ku munsi — inzira yawe bwite yo kugera ku kuvuga neza no kwinjiza byinshi.

problem.title: Umwanya w'Amahirwe
problem.subtitle: Abantu benshi b'impangazimu bafite impano bahatiwe amahirwe yo ku isi — atari kubera ko badafite ubumenyi, ahubwo kubera ko badashobora kubivuga mu Cyongereza.
problem.stat3Label: abantu biga Icyongereza ku isi hose

howItWorks.title: Uko Bikora
howItWorks.subtitle: Nta cyemezo gikomeye. Tugena byose. Wowe wihutire gusa.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Ikizamini cy'ibibazo 10 gishyiraho urwego rwawe rwa CEFR (A1–C2) kandi gikoreshwa mu rugendo rwawe rwose rw'iminsi 365.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Buri munsi ubona amasomo 2 y'iminota 15. Kwandika, Kumva, cyangwa Mwarimu wa AI — twebwe tubyemeza, wowe ubishyira mu bikorwa.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Reba urwego rwawe rwa CEFR rugenda ruzamuka, ubumenyi bwawe bugenda butera imbere, n'urukurikirane rugenda rukura. Ikibaho cyawe kigaragaza iterambere ryose.

features.title: Byubatswe ku Iterambere ry'Umwuga
features.subtitle: Moduli enye z'ingenzi, zifashijwe na AI

writing.title: Imyitozo yo Kwandika
writing.description: Imyitozo yandike nk'iy'IELTS n'ibisubizo bya AI ku giramarki, ijambo n'imiterere — hamwe n'interuro zakunguranijwe.

listening.title: Imyitozo yo Kumva
listening.description: AI ikora inshamake zisomwa n'ijwi rya tekinoloji. Subiza ibibazo by'ubumenyi ubone ibisobanuro byihuse.

tutor.title: Ikiganiro na Mwarimu wa AI
tutor.description: Mwarimu wawe bwite w'Icyongereza uboneka igihe cyose. Baza ibibazo bya giramarki, witoza ikiganiro, ubore ubufasha bw'amagambo. Mwarimu azi urwego rwawe kandi yihinduranya.

speaking.title: Imyitozo yo Kuvuga
speaking.description: Ijwi n'inyandiko hamwe n'igisubizo cya AI mu gihe nyacyo — ubungubu, giramariki, amagambo, n'ibisubizo by'akarorero.

pricing.title: Shyira Imari mu Mwuga Wawe
pricing.subtitle: Shyira imari mu bwawe. Icyongereza cyiza = umwuga mwiza = amafaranga menshi.
pricing.dailyFeature3: Hagarika igihe icyo ari cyo cyose

founder.title: Byubatswe na Emre Varol
founder.bio: Umuhanga mu ikoranabuhanga n'umushinganwa wibanda ku gukoresha ikoranabuhanga mu gushaka amahirwe y'ubukungu. english.cash ihuza amahugurwa y'ururimi akoreshwa na AI n'ibisubizo bijyanye n'umwuga.

cefr.title: Yihinduranya n'Urwego Rwawe
cefr.subtitle: AI yacu ihinduranya buri myitozo hakurikijwe urwego rwawe rwa CEFR

cta.title: Fungura Amahirwe y'Umwuga ku Isi Hose
cta.subtitle: Iminota 15 ku munsi ni byo gusa bisabwa. Tangira ubuntu iminsi 3.

landing.footer: © 2026 english.cash · Icyongereza Gifashijwe na AI ku Mwuga w'Isi · Emre Varol

login.title: Murakaza Neza
login.subtitle: Injira gukomeza urugendo rwawe rwo kwiga Icyongereza
login.error: Imeyili cyangwa ijambo ry'ibanga ntabwo ari ryo

register.subtitle: Tangira urugendo rwawe rwo kwiga Icyongereza uyu munsi

verify.title: Emeza Imeyili Yawe
verify.subtitle: Twohereje kode y'imibare 6 kuri
verify.success: Imeyili yemejwe! Uragejejwe ku rupapuro rwo kwinjira...
verify.error: Kode idakora cyangwa yarangiye. Nyamuneka gerageza nanone.
verify.devNote: Uburyo bwo guteza imbere — kode yawe ya OTP ni:

assessment.title: Ikizamini cy'Icyongereza
assessment.subtitle: Subiza ibibazo 10 kugira ngo bimenye urwego rwawe rwa CEFR. Bitugirira ngo bwite ubwigishirize bwawe.
assessment.question: Ikibazo
assessment.loginMessage: Nyamuneka injira kugira ngo ukore ikizamini.

dashboard.title: Ikibaho Cyawe
dashboard.keepPracticing: Komeza kwimenyereza kugira ngo uzamure urwego rwawe rw'Icyongereza.
dashboard.loginMessage: Nyamuneka injira kugira ngo ubone ikibaho cyawe.
dashboard.noDataYet: Nta makuru ahari. Tangira kwimenyereza kugira ngo ubone iterambere ryawe!

learningPath.title: Inzira yo Kwiga
learningPath.subtitle: Iminsi 365 · Amasomo 2 × iminota 15
learningPath.loginMessage: Nyamuneka injira kugira ngo ubone inzira yawe yo kwiga.
learningPath.amazingWork: Umurimo mwiza! Warangije amasomo y'uyu munsi. Turabonana ejo!
learningPath.startStreakDesc: Rangiza amasomo yombi uyu munsi kugira ngo utangire urukurikirane.

tips.readAloud: Soma inshamake yawe mu ijwi ryumvikana nyuma yo kwandika — bigufasha kubona amakosa.
tips.askGrammar: Baza mwarimu wa AI ku mategeko ya giramariki ukomerezaho.
tips.listenTwice: Kumva inshamake kabiri mbere yo gusubiza ibibazo.
tips.usePhrases: Koresha amagambo nka "Amakuru agaragaza ko..." mu gusobanura amakuru.
tips.learnWords: Iga amagambo 3 mashya uyu munsi kandi uyakoreshe mu nteruro.
tips.setTimer: Shyiraho isaha y'iminota 15 wandike utaruhuka — ubwinshi bwubaka ubungubu.
tips.reviewWeek: Suzuma ibyo wize iki cyumweru. Iki cyari ikigoye cyane?

writing.title: Imyitozo yo Kwandika
writing.loginMessage: Nyamuneka injira kugira ngo witoza kwandika.
writing.connectionError: Ikosa ry'itumanaho. Nyamuneka suzuma interineti yawe ugerageze nanone.

speaking.title: Imyitozo yo Kuvuga
speaking.noSupport: Gushyiraho ijwi ntabwo bikunzwe muri porogaramu yawe. Nyamuneka koresha Chrome.
speaking.comingSoonDesc: Turimo gukora moduli yo kuvuga ifite isuzumwa ry'ijwi mu gihe nyacyo.
speaking.interimDesc: Hagati aho, witoza kuvuga uganira n'ibyo biganiro by'uyu munsi na Mwarimu wa AI.
speaking.practiceWithTutor: Ahubwo witoza na Mwarimu wa AI
speaking.textModeDesc: Vuga mu ijwi ryawe, hanyuma wandike ibyo wavuze (cyangwa wandike igisubizo cyawe ku buryo butaziguye):
speaking.errorTooShort: Recording was too short. Please speak for at least a few seconds.
speaking.errorNoSpeech: No speech detected. Please try again and speak clearly.
speaking.errorNetwork: Could not connect to speech service. Please try again.
speaking.errorNotAllowed: Kwinjira muri mikorofone byanzwe. Bemerera mikorofone mu igenamiterere rya porogaramu, cyangwa uhindure uburyo bwo kwandika.
speaking.errorAudioCapture: Nta mikorofone yabonetse. Hindura uburyo bwo kwandika.
speaking.errorGeneric: Ikosa ry'ijwi: {error}. Gerageza uburyo bwo kwandika.
speaking.loginMessage: Nyamuneka injira kugira ngo witoza kuvuga.

listening.title: Imyitozo yo Kumva
listening.loginMessage: Nyamuneka injira kugira ngo witoza kumva.
listening.playerDesc: Kumva inshamake yakozwe na AI, hanyuma usubize ibibazo by'ubumenyi. Ntuzabona inyandiko — witoza amatwi yawe!
listening.errorGenerate: Ntibyashobotse gukora ibiri muri byo. Nyamuneka gerageza nanone.
listening.noPlaysLeft: Nta mahirwe yo kumva ubuntu asigaye
listening.listenFirst: Kumva inshamake mbere yo gusubiza ibibazo
listening.readyToListen: Witeguye? Kanda kumva. Ufite amahirwe 2 yo kumva ubuntu.
listening.lastListen: Uyu ni umuryango wawe wa nyuma wo kumva!

tutor.title: Mwarimu wa AI
tutor.subtitle: Mbaza icyo ushaka ku Cyongereza!
tutor.loginMessage: Nyamuneka injira kugira ngo uganire na Mwarimu wa AI.
tutor.greeting:
Muraho **{name}**! 👋 Ndi mwarimu wawe w'Icyongereza wa AI.

Ndabona uri ku **rwego {level}** — nzahinduranya byose kuri urwego rwawe.

Uyu munsi ushaka gukora iki? Ushobora kumbaza ibya giramarki, amagambo, inama zo kwandika, cyangwa ikintu icyo ari cyo cyose kijyanye n'Icyongereza!
tutor.suggestion1: Sobanura itandukaniro riri hagati ya 'since' na 'for'
tutor.suggestion3: Mpa amagambo 5 y'urwego rwo hejuru mu kwandika kw'amashuri
tutor.suggestion4: Itandukaniro riri he hagati y'urwego rwa B1 na B2?
tutor.suggestion5: Kosorora ibi: 'Yesterday I go to school'
tutor.suggestion6: Nkungura nte ubuziranenge mu nshamake zanjye?
tutor.suggestion7: Ni izihe mvugo nziza zo guhuza mu nshamake?
tutor.suggestion8: Sobanura present perfect tense hamwe n'ingero

social.title: Inshuti & Imibanire
social.subtitle: Hura n'abandi biga, ugereranye aho ugeze, kandi usangire ibyagezweho.
social.loginMessage: Nyamuneka injira kugira ngo ugere kuri serivisi z'imibanire.
social.noFriends: Nta nshuti naho. Shakisha maze wongeremo umuntu!
social.shareText: {name} ari ku rwego {level} kuri english.cash! Inyandiko: {writing}/10 · Kuvuga: {speaking}/10 · Kumva: {listening}/10 · Amagambo: {vocabulary}/10 · Ikigezweho: {grammar}/10
social.inviteSubtitle: Sangira kode yawe. Inshuti yawe nibagura premium, ubona iminsi 7 y'ubuntu!

vocabulary.title: Kubaka Amagambo
vocabulary.subtitle: Iga amagambo mashya ukoresheje imikino
vocabulary.notQuite: Si byo neza — reba igisubizo ukuri hasi
vocabulary.subscriptionRequired: Abonnemani ikora irakenewe kugirango ubone amagambo. Tangira icyiciro cy'ubusa ku dashboard!

common.subscriptionExpiredDesc: Kugira ngo ukomeze gukoresha ibikorwa bikoreshwa na AI nk'igisubizo cy'abanditsi, isesengura ry'imvugo, imyitozo y'amagambo, n'ibindi byinshi, hagurura gahunda yawe.
